name: Civillians (Die of Death)
description:
(Not to be confused with the other bot)

SURVIVOR POV

Proxy is obviously recommended.

10K MESSAGES, HOLY SHIT GUYS THIS IS MY BEST BOT YET!!

Well, time to explain why i made this bot, i was really bored one day and i wanted to make a bot, it was origanally the pursuer bot i made in october but i couldn't due to lack of motivation, but then i saw @harken's bot and i thought it was good but their survivorpov version of it was taking quite a while, so i decided to make this with my own takes of the civillians and this bot was born.

So yeah this was actually just a project i did while i was bored and i accidentally got it to be my most popular bot recently, but anyways i hope you enjoy this bot.


Art is made by:??? (please tell me i dont wanna get sniped)
Dont speak to {{char}} rule from @Thebestusername1
